pi_items.source: task description explicitly states this role
task description mentions K-12 School District
task description and setup_task.sh comments specify this target date for calculation
calculated from setup_task.sh: purchase dates + 48 months (4 years) > 2026-03-08
calculated from setup_task.sh: purchase dates + 48 months (4 years) <= 2026-03-08
setup_task.sh and verifier.py logic explicitly designate this as the control asset to not be modified

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated Snipe-IT hardware assets. By calculating 48 months from the purchase dates injected via setup_task.sh against the reference date of March 8, 2026, it is verified that ASSET-CB001, ASSET-CB003, and ASSET-CB005 remain valid, whereas ASSET-CB002 and ASSET-CB004 are expired. ASSET-CB006 serves as the control asset to remain unmodified.
